body.purpose: Module names in the popup. Primary readable size.

label.purpose: Module descriptions. Muted color reinforces subordinate role.

motion.name: overlay-reveal
motion.purpose: YouTube overlay icon opacity on parent hover.

components.name: Toggle Switch
components.description: iOS-style toggle for enabling/disabling modules. Standard size for ungrouped, compact for grouped.
components.css: .ds-toggle { position: relative; width: 36px; height: 20px; } .ds-toggle input { position: absolute; opacity: 0; width: 0; height: 0; } .ds-toggle-track { display: block; width: 36px; height: 20px; border-radius: 10px; background: #cccccc; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out; } .ds-toggle-knob { display: block; position: absolute; top: 2px; left: 2px; width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%; background: #ffffff; transition: transform 150ms ease-out; pointer-events: none; } .ds-toggle input:checked + .ds-toggle-track { background: #e5484d; } .ds-toggle input:checked ~ .ds-toggle-knob { transform: translateX(16px); }

components.name: Module Row
components.description: Settings row for a single module: name, description, and toggle.
components.css: .ds-module-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; padding: 10px; border-radius: 8px; transition: background 120ms ease; list-style: none; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; color: #0f0f0f; } .ds-module-row:hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.06); } .ds-module-row label { flex: 1; cursor: pointer; min-width: 0; } .ds-name { display: block; font-weight: 400; font-size: 13.5px; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-description { display: block; margin-top: 2px; color: #6b6b6b; font-size: 11.5px; line-height: 1.35; } .ds-toggle { position: relative; flex-shrink: 0; width: 36px; height: 20px; } .ds-toggle input { position: absolute; opacity: 0; width: 0; height: 0; } .ds-toggle-track { display: block; width: 36px; height: 20px; border-radius: 10px; background: #cccccc; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out; } .ds-toggle-knob { display: block; position: absolute; top: 2px; left: 2px; width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%; background: #ffffff; transition: transform 150ms ease-out; pointer-events: none; } .ds-toggle input:checked + .ds-toggle-track { background: #e5484d; } .ds-toggle input:checked ~ .ds-toggle-knob { transform: translateX(16px); }

components.name: Pill Button (YouTube)
components.description: Chip-style button injected into YouTube's watch page action row.
components.css: .ds-pill-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; border: none; border-radius: 18px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); color: rgb(241,241,241); font: 500 14px/36px Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-pill-btn:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); } .ds-pill-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-pill-btn svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; }

components.name: Overlay Icon Button (YouTube)
components.description: Circular icon button on feed cards, revealed on parent hover.
components.css: .ds-overlay-icon { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 36px; height: 36px; padding: 0; border: none; border-radius: 18px; background: transparent; color: rgb(241,241,241); cursor: pointer; opacity: 1; transition: opacity 0.2s, background 0.2s; } .ds-overlay-icon:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); } .ds-overlay-icon:focus-visible { opacity: 1; outline: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-overlay-icon svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; }

components.name: Group Header
components.description: Section divider in the popup separating module groups.
components.html: • Minimalist YouTubeStrip away distractions from your feed
components.css: .ds-group-header { padding: 12px 10px 4px; list-style: none; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; } .ds-group-name { display: block; font-weight: 600; font-size: 12.5px; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: 0.01em; color: #0f0f0f; } .ds-group-desc { display: block; margin-top: 1px; color: #6b6b6b; font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.35; }

narrative.overview:
Fast, practiced, in-and-out before you notice. Every feature exists to remove friction from YouTube, not to announce itself. The visual system has two distinct layers: the popup (an owned settings surface using system fonts and the extension's own tokens) and YouTube-embedded UI (injected elements that borrow YouTube's CSS custom properties and mimic native controls). These layers never cross; the popup never looks like YouTube, and injected UI never looks like the popup.

The extension ships opinionated defaults and minimal configuration. A toggle is the most complex control any module needs. If a feature can't render, it shows nothing rather than a broken state. The visual language follows YouTube's lead inside the page and stays restrained in the popup.
keyCharacteristics: Two-layer visual system: popup tokens vs YouTube's --yt-spec-* variables
System font stack throughout the popup; Roboto for injected UI
Single accent color used sparingly: toggle on-state and the wordmark highlight
Flat surfaces, no shadows, no elevation hierarchy

rules.name: The Borrowed Palette Rule
rules.body: YouTube-embedded UI never carries the extension's own colors into the page. It uses var(--yt-spec-badge-chip-background), var(--yt-spec-text-primary), and YouTube's native values exclusively. The extension's accent red stays in the popup.

rules.name: The Two-Stack Rule
rules.body: System font in the popup, Roboto in YouTube. Never mix them.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are prohibited. If a surface needs to feel elevated, use a subtle background tint or opacity shift.

dos: Do use YouTube's CSS custom properties (--yt-spec-*) for all injected UI.
Do use the system font stack for all popup text.
Do keep the accent red below 10% of any popup screen.
Do use opacity and background-tint transitions for state changes.
Do prefix injected element IDs with ytdc- to avoid collisions.
Do use prefers-color-scheme for popup theming.
donts: Don't bring the popup's accent color into YouTube's page.
Don't add shadows, gradients, or blur effects.
Don't use bounce or elastic easing. Transitions are ease-out or ease, 120-200ms.
Don't build settings pages, option tabs, or preference panels.
Don't add gamification patterns: streaks, badges, progress bars.
Don't use neon colors, playful animations, or emoji in UI copy.
Don't style injected YouTube UI to look like the popup.
